messages.content: You are a Samsung technical support specialist.
How do I configure Tap View and Tap Sound on my Samsung mobile for the feature to work?
Enable Tap View, Tap Sound on your mobile device.

chunk_text:
By tapping the mobile device on your TV, you can watch Multi View or mobile device's screen through the TV screen.
When you tap a mobile device on your TV while running a music app on your mobile device, the TV screen switches
to the Music Wall screen.

This function is only available in Samsung mobile devices with Android 8.1 or higher.

1. Enable Tap View, Tap Sound on your mobile device.

For more information about configuration, refer to 'Enabling Tap View'.

2. Turn on the screen of your mobile device.

3. Tap your mobile device on the TV. The TV screen switches to Multi View , Music Wall , or mobile device's screen.

Be sure to tap away from the TV screen and bezel corners. It may scratch or break the TV or mobile device screen.

We recommend using your mobile device with the cover in place and lightly tap it on any external edge of the TV.

When you perform Tap View in Ambient mode or Art mode, only the mobile device's screen appears on the TV.

4. Watch the Multi View , Music Wall , or mobile device's screen on the TV screen.

Music Wall screen is a function that allows you to enjoy music along with visual video effects that change according to the
genre and beat of the music.

The displayed TV screen may differ depending on the model.

This function enables Screen/Sound Mirroring by detecting vibrations generated when you tap the mobile device on the TV.

Which services does the Service Apps feature include?

The Service Apps feature includes video calls, remote working, health-related services like home training and remote medical treatment, karaoke (Stingray Karaoke), children's content (Baby Shark World for Kids), remote PC/Mac/mobile device access (Workspace), and exercise data tracking (Workout Tracker).

chunk_text:
Service Apps

This feature provides useful services for everyday life, such as video calls and remote working, as well as health­
related services that help with healthcare, such as home training and remote medical treatment. This allows users
to conveniently experience different lifestyles, including karaoke and children's content that the whole family can
enjoy.

Services supported by this feature may differ, depending on the model and region.

Various other services are available, in addition to the services shown below.

• Stingray Karaoke

With this karaoke service, sing the latest songs with your family and friends.

• Baby Shark World for Kids

Provides early childhood education content featuring characters like Baby Shark and Bebefinn. This allows
children to learn about a variety of topics, including numbers, the human body, dinosaurs, and space.

For more information, refer to "Using SmartThings."

• Workspace

Use the remote function to connect to and use a Windows PC, Mac computer, or mobile device from the TV.

For more information, refer to "Using Workspace."

• Workout Tracker

Connect to a nearby Galaxy Watch to view saved exercise data from the TV screen.

For more information on Workout Tracker , refer to the User Guide provided by Samsung Daily+.

provenance.chunk: Blocking Programs based on their Downloadable U.S. Rating (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
The Downloadable U.S. Rating system only applies to material originating from US DTV channels.

Parental restriction information is automatically downloaded while you watch DTV channels. This download may
take several seconds. If the information is unavailable from the broadcasting station, the Downloadable U.S. Rating
menu is deactivated.

Parental restriction levels differ with the broadcasting station. The default menu name and the Downloadable U.S.
Rating name changes depending on the downloaded information.

Even when the on-screen display is set to another language, the Downloadable U.S. Rating menu appears only in
English.
